fixes.detail: candidate-approve now promotes item/content candidates to state.items, appends evidence, updates search index, and records promoted_item_id.
thumbnail resolution now prioritizes generated data previews for local approved candidates and validates bundled preview candidates.
All existing bundled items have matching assets/previews/<item_id>.jpg files.

manual_note: Changes are local-session safe; use Export session or Export review patch after approving items.
